sections.paragraph:
m. pl. דְּבָרִים ( Hos 13:14), prop. destruction, death, like the Arab. دَبْرُ (see the root No. 4, and Piel No. 3); hence a plague (compare מָוֶת No. 3), Exo 9:3 Lev 26:25 Deu 28:21 2Sa 24:13 1Ki 8:37, etc.; LXX. commonly θάνατος; compare Sir_39:29 .

[“דִּבֵּר i.q. דָּבָר Jer 5:13.”]
